creator: larshenrikoern@outlook.dk
text:
Hi

realtek-re-kmod hangs boot on amd64 14-STABLE. This happens every time at boot when

if_re_load="YES"
if_re_name="/boot/modules/if_re.ko"

 is written in /boot/loader.conf. I fortunately have a wireless dongle working. But this driver is currently not working on my 14-STABLE Alpha4.

Have a nice day
Lars H
